    def test_delete_document_removes_assignments(self, admin_token):
        """Deleting a document should also remove its assignments."""
        import io
        api = AuthedClient(token=admin_token)
    
        # Upload a test document
        upload_resp = api.post(
            "/api/v1/documents/upload",
            files={"file": ("cascade_test.txt", io.BytesIO(b"cascade test"), "text/plain")},
            data={"description": "[REGTEST] cascade delete test"},
        )
        doc_id = upload_resp.json().get("id")
    
        # Assign to self
        me_id = api.get("/api/v1/auth/me").json().get("id")
        api.post(
            f"/api/v1/documents/{doc_id}/assignments",
            json={"entity_type": "employee", "entity_id": me_id},
        )
    
        # Verify assignment exists
        assignments = api.get(f"/api/v1/documents/{doc_id}/assignments").json()
        assert len(assignments) >= 1
    
        # Delete document record
        del_resp = api.delete(f"/api/v1/isud/documents/{doc_id}")
        if del_resp.status_code == 500:
